name: Apple___Apple_scab
cause: Fungus Venturia inaequalis. Favorable conditions are cool, wet weather.
cure: Choose resistant varieties when possible. Rake under trees and destroy infected leaves to reduce fungal spores. Water in evening or early morning hours to give leaves time to dry. Apply liquid copper soap early, two weeks before symptoms appear. Repeat applications at 7-10 day intervals up to blossom drop.
prescription: Katyayani Prozol Propiconazole 25% EC Systematic Fungicide

name: Apple___Black_rot
cause: Caused by the fungus Botryosphaeria obtusa.
cure: Remove cankers by pruning at least 15 inches below the end and burn or bury them. Prune during dormant season to minimize fire blight infection. Use copper-based fungicide to protect against both black rot and fire blight.

name: Apple___Cedar_apple_rust
cause: Fungus Gymnosporangium juniperi-virginianae. Requires junipers as an alternate host.
supplements: Potassium Sulphate (SOP), Zinc Sulphate + Manganese Sulphate.
cure: Choose resistant cultivars when available. Remove galls from infected junipers. Apply preventative fungicides weekly starting with bud break. On juniper, spray with copper solution (0.5-2.0 oz/gallon) 4 times between late August and late October.

name: Apple___healthy
cure: Maintain proper nutrition with NPK fertilizers. Ensure adequate sunlight (6+ hours daily). Provide well-drained soil with good moisture retention. Regular monitoring for early disease detection.

name: Background_without_leaves
cure: Please upload an image containing plant leaves for accurate disease detection.

name: Blueberry___healthy
cure: Use deep, low pH mulch like peat moss or pine needles. Water during the day, keep soil moist but not soggy. Provide 1 inch per week during growing season, up to 4 inches during fruit ripening.

name: Cherry___Powdery_mildew
cure: Prune out and discard diseased portions immediately. Apply fungicides to protect remaining leaves. Repeat fungicide applications according to label instructions throughout the season.

name: Cherry___healthy
cure: Apply mulch to retain moisture. Water routinely in dry areas. No fruit thinning needed as cherries thin naturally. Protect from birds with netting.
prescription: Plantic Organic BloomDrop Liquid Plant Food

name: Corn___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray_leaf_spot
cure: Irrigate deeply but infrequently. Avoid post-emergent weed killers during active disease. Avoid medium to high nitrogen fertilizer levels. Improve air circulation.

name: Corn___Common_rust
cure: Plant resistant corn varieties. Apply fungicides when symptoms first appear. Ensure proper field sanitation and crop rotation.
prescription: 3 STAR M45 Mancozeb 75% WP Contact Fungicide

name: Corn___Northern_Leaf_Blight
cure: Apply fungicides at disease onset. Use resistant corn hybrids. Ensure proper field drainage and air circulation.
prescription: QUIT (Carbendazim 12% + Mancozeb 63% WP) Protective And Curative Fungicide

name: Corn___healthy
cure: Maintain consistent moisture without waterlogging. Fertilize every 6 months. Provide bright indirect light. Monitor for yellowing leaves indicating overwatering.
prescription: Biomass Lab Sampoorn Fasal Ahaar (Multipurpose Organic Fertilizer & Plant Food)

name: Grape___Black_rot
cure: Apply Mancozeb or Nova (myclobutanil) fungicides. Remove infected plant parts. Ensure proper vineyard sanitation and pruning.

name: Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles)
cure: Remove infected berries, leaves and trunk parts. Apply wound sealant (5% boric acid in acrylic paint) to prune wounds. No fully effective treatment available.

name: Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spot)
cure: Apply dormant sprays to reduce inoculum. Open canopy for better air circulation. Use protectant and systemic fungicides. Scout regularly.
prescription: Tebulur Tebuconazole 10% + Sulphur 65% WG , Advance Broad Spectrum Premix Fungicides

name: Grape___healthy
cure: Apply water only to root zone. Avoid wetting foliage. Reduce watering in fall for young vines. Ensure well-drained soil.

name: Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening)
cause: Bacterium Candidatus Liberibacter spp. Spread by psyllid insects.
supplements: Multiplex Micronutrient Mixture, Zinc Sulphate, Ferrous Sulphate.
cure: Control Asian Citrus Psyllid with Neem oil insecticide. Treat mold growth with liquid copper fungicide. Remove infected trees to prevent spread.
prescription: Green Dews CITRUS PLANT FOOD Fertilizer

name: Peach___Bacterial_spot
cure: Apply copper-based bactericides. Ensure proper pruning and sanitation. Avoid overhead irrigation. Use resistant varieties when available.

name: Peach___healthy
cure: Regular pruning, fertilizing, and spraying needed. Keep ground clear of competing weeds. Apply mulch generously. Water consistently.

name: Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot
cure: Use resistant varieties. Treat seeds with 10% chlorine bleach solution. Mulch deeply. Avoid overhead watering. Apply fixed copper fungicide every 10-14 days.
prescription: Systemic Fungicide (Domark) Tetraconazole 3.8% w/w (4% w/v) EW

name: Pepper,_bell___healthy
cure: Keep well-watered but never soggy. Water to 6 inches depth, then let dry slightly. Maintain consistent moisture during fruit set and maturation.
prescription: Casa De Amor Organic Potash Fertilizer

name: Potato___Early_blight
cure: Plant resistant late-maturing varieties. Avoid overhead irrigation. Ensure good air circulation. Apply preventive fungicides.

name: Potato___Late_blight
cure: Apply mancozeb at 0.25% followed by systemic fungicides. Use prophylactic sprays. Ensure proper field drainage.

name: Potato___healthy
cure: Water consistently to 8-10 inches depth. During hot seasons, water twice daily. Maintain proper soil drainage.

name: Raspberry___healthy
cure: Water 1 inch per week from spring until after harvest. Regular watering better than deep soaking. Remove suckers growing away from rows.

name: Soybean___healthy
cure: Keep planting beds evenly moist until emergence. Water regularly during flowering and pod formation. Avoid overhead watering. Mulch when soil warms above 60°F.

name: Squash___Powdery_mildew
cure: Combine 1 tablespoon baking soda + 0.5 teaspoon liquid soap with 1 gallon water. Spray liberally. Ensure good air movement through proper spacing.

name: Strawberry___Leaf_scorch
cure: Remove infected garden debris. Establish new strawberry transplants frequently. Maintain proper garden sanitation. Apply preventive fungicides.
prescription: Greatindos Premium Quality All in 1 Organic Fungicide

name: Strawberry___healthy
cure: Maintain consistent watering. Remove runners and weeds. Apply balanced fertilizers. Ensure good air circulation.
prescription: SWISS GREEN ORGANIC PLANT GROWTH PROMOTER STRAWBERRY Fertilizer

name: Tomato___Bacterial_spot
cure: Use resistant varieties. Apply copper-based bactericides. Avoid overhead watering. Maintain proper plant spacing.

name: Tomato___Early_blight
cure: Apply fungicides at first sign of disease. Ensure good air circulation. Remove infected plant debris. Use resistant varieties.

name: Tomato___Late_blight
cure: Apply mancozeb or systemic fungicides. Remove infected plants immediately. Ensure proper field drainage and air circulation.

name: Tomato___Leaf_Mold
cure: Improve air circulation. Reduce humidity around plants. Apply appropriate fungicides. Remove infected plant parts.
prescription: Virus Special (Set of Immuno 1 ltr + Enviro 1 ltr)

name: Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot
cure: Remove infected lower leaves. Apply fungicides preventively. Ensure good air circulation. Avoid overhead watering.

name: Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider_mite
cure: Apply miticides or insecticidal soaps. Increase humidity around plants. Remove heavily infested leaves. Use beneficial predatory mites.

name: Tomato___Target_Spot
cure: Apply fungicides containing chlorothalonil or copper. Remove infected plant debris. Ensure proper plant spacing and air circulation.
prescription: Propi Propineb 70% WP Fungicide for Plants Diesese Control Pesticide

name: Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus
cure: Control whitefly vectors with insecticides. Remove infected plants. Use virus-resistant varieties. Maintain proper field sanitation.

name: Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus
cause: Virus transmitted through contact and contaminated tools.
cure: Disinfect tools between plants. Remove infected plants. Use virus-free seeds. Avoid handling plants when wet.

name: Tomato___healthy
cure: Maintain consistent watering. Provide support structures. Apply balanced fertilizers regularly. Monitor for early disease signs.
prescription: Tomato Fertilizer Organic, for Home, Balcony, Terrace & Outdoor Gardening
